content: GitHub users with email set to private return null from /api.github.com/user. Better Auth's GitHub provider handles this automatically: if profile.email is null it calls /user/emails endpoint and picks the primary email. Default scopes include 'user:email' which grants /user/emails access. No custom getUserInfo override needed for standard cases. Edge case: if emails array is also empty (GitHub App without Email Addresses permission), profile.email remains null and Better Auth may fail to create user. For GitHub Apps: enable Email Addresses: Read-only permission under Account Permissions.
